sentences.english: I help my parents with housework on the weekends.
I vacuum my room and clean the bathroom.
sentences.korean: 내 방에 청소기를 돌리고 화장실을 청소해요.

sentences.english: My sister does the dishes after dinner.
My dad takes out the trash every morning.
sentences.korean: 아빠는 매일 아침 쓰레기를 내다 버려요.

sentences.english: Working together makes everything faster and easier.
sentences.korean: 함께 하면 모든 게 더 빠르고 쉬워요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
